title: An Ordinary Day
overview: Returning to Puerto Rico after living abroad for a long time, Paco, out of work, meets successful Nicolás, an old friend from his college years. Nicolás invites him to his house, where Paco meets a woman from his past.

trailers.title: Nicolás y los demás (1986) - Daniel Lugo y Jacobo Morales
